title: Figure 4 from: Herrera Mesías F, Weigand AM (2021) Updates to the checklist of the wild bee fauna of Luxembourg as inferred from revised natural history collection data and fieldwork. Biodiversity Data Journal 9: e64027. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.9.e64027
author: Herrera Mesías, Fernanda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4 Andrena lagopus (Latreille, 1809) (Kehlen, specimen MNHNL100056; BOLD identifier MNHNL162-21, one middle leg was used for DNA extraction). a. Dorsal view; b. Lateral view; c. Wing, showing submarginal cells; d. Propodeum; e. Abdomen, showing band and punctures in the tergites. Photos: MNHNL. Background edited using GIMP 2.8.22 (The GIMP Development Team 2020).
